hero.liveTracking: Verified impact intelligence across 54 African nations
hero.title: Verify Impact. Unlock Funding. Build Trust.
hero.subtitle: DevMapper is Africa's infrastructure for verified impact and ESG accountability — enabling governments, corporates, and development partners to move from reported impact to proven impact.

features.title: From Data to Decision Power
features.subtitle: A verification ecosystem that captures, validates, and scores real-world development activity — enabling trust at scale.
features.interactiveMappingDesc: Explore verified and unverified projects across Africa with real-time Earth observation data, colour-coded by credibility status.
features.communityVerificationDesc: Multi-layer validation from communities, partners, and institutions ensures data credibility — not just data collection.
features.realTimeAnalyticsDesc: Impact scoring, credibility ratings, and funding readiness indicators turn data into actionable insights for funders and executives.
features.sdgAgendaDesc: Automatic alignment with UN SDGs, AU Agenda 2063, and global ESG standards including IFRS S1/S2 and Nigeria FRC SRG1.
features.esgReportingDesc: Full GHG Protocol Scope 1-3 tracking, IFRS-compliant report generation, scenario analysis, and supplier emissions management.
features.partnerNetworkDesc: Connect NGOs, governments, corporations, and donors into a single verification ecosystem with role-based access and multi-stakeholder affiliation.

whyNow.title: Why Verified Impact Matters
whyNow.subtitle: The gap is not funding. The gap is trust. Unprecedented convergence of regulatory pressure, ESG momentum, and digital capability creates the defining moment for accountability.
whyNow.deadlineDesc: With only 4 years until the UN SDG deadline, tracking and verifying progress is existential. Every unverified claim is a missed opportunity for real impact.
whyNow.momentumDesc: IFRS S1/S2 sustainability disclosure standards are becoming law globally. Nigeria's FRC SRG1 2026 requires compliance. Organizations need systems, not spreadsheets.
whyNow.digitalDesc: 600M+ mobile users across Africa enable community-driven verification at scale. The technology to prove impact finally exists.
whyNow.esgDesc: Billions are invested into development every year, yet much of that impact remains unverified, fragmented, or overstated. Institutions demand proof, not reports.

howItWorks.title: How DevMapper Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple system designed for real-world use — from ground-level capture to executive-level decision-making.
howItWorks.reportDesc: Projects are uploaded with geolocation, evidence, photos, and SDG alignment — capturing reality as it happens.
howItWorks.verifyDesc: Multi-layer validation from communities, partners, and institutions confirms what is real and flags what is not.
howItWorks.scoreDesc: Each project is assigned a credibility and impact score based on evidence strength, verification depth, and outcome achievement.
howItWorks.trackDesc: Funders, corporates, and governments make informed decisions based on verified, decision-ready intelligence.

map.title: Explore Projects with Earth Intelligence
map.subtitle: Visually track projects with real-time Earth observation data including vegetation, water, urban development, and emissions.

impact.title: Our Impact in Numbers
impact.subtitle: Real data from real communities driving sustainable development across Africa.

cta.title: Build What Can Be Trusted
cta.subtitle: If impact cannot be verified, it cannot be scaled. Join institutions, communities, and partners building the infrastructure for verified impact across Africa.
cta.noCreditCard: No credit card required • Free forever for individual reporters

footer.tagline: Building systems for verified impact and accountability across Africa.
footer.copyright: © 2025 DevMapper. Built for sustainable development in Africa.
